name: Fujian Rongji Software Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Rongji Software Co., Ltd. engages in the development and distribution of software products in China. The company offers software products for e-government, judicial, quality inspection information, and environmental information industries. The company also provides network engineering, data center, disaster recovery, information security, collaborative management, and system integration services. It primarily serves energy, telecommunication, finance, and manufacturing industries. Fujian Rongji Software Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Fuzhou, China.
